summary: #89520 remains the live canonical issue. #90503 is the cleanest candidate fix path for the same root cause, with passing checks and focused session-store files. #89538 overlaps the same fix area but is superseded by #90503 because it is dirty, has failing checks, and includes unrelated WebRTC changes.

actions.reason: Best surviving issue for the root cause; keep open until a fix lands and post-merge closeout is separately allowed.
